# Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run smoke` when capture behavior changes

# Maintainer Checklist

- [ ] Output changes include fixture coverage or a clear reason coverage is not needed.
- [ ] No private paths, cookies, tokens, vault files, or local databases are included.
- [ ] Source links, timestamps, hashes, assets, and evidence gaps remain reviewable.
